series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Army National Guard Scholarship Program
series_metadata.series_description: This file consists of computer printouts of Ohio ARNG members applying for scholarship; certification rosters of members attending college and ADP punch cards for production of printouts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Retained in operating area (full college completions). record holding 4 additional years (completion of NG enlistment); destroyed 8 years from date of enlistment
